member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Common.BaseEntity
member.summary: Base entity providing common audit fields and concurrency control via RowVersion. All domain entities should inherit from this class.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Common.BaseEntity.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this entity.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Common.BaseEntity.CreatedAtUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the entity was created.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Common.BaseEntity.UpdatedAtUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the entity was last modified.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Common.BaseEntity.RowVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the row version used for optimistic concurrency control.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Common.BaseEntity.MarkAsUpdated
member.summary: Marks the entity as modified by updating the timestamp.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Order
member.summary: Represents an order placed by a customer.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Order.CustomerId
member.summary: Gets the customer identifier.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Order.Status
member.summary: Gets the order status.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Order.TotalAmount
member.summary: Gets the total amount for the order.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Order.Items
member.summary: Gets the read-only collection of order items.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Order.Create(System.Guid)
member.summary: Factory method to create a new Order.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Order.AddItem(System.Guid,System.String,System.Int32,System.Decimal)
member.summary: Adds an item to the order and recalculates the total.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Order.Confirm
member.summary: Marks the order as confirmed.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OrderItem
member.summary: Represents a single line item within an order.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OrderItem.OrderId
member.summary: Gets the parent order identifier.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OrderItem.ProductId
member.summary: Gets the product identifier.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OrderItem.ProductName
member.summary: Gets the product name at time of order.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OrderItem.Quantity
member.summary: Gets the quantity ordered.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OrderItem.UnitPrice
member.summary: Gets the unit price at time of order.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OrderItem.TotalPrice
member.summary: Gets the total price for this line item.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OrderStatus
member.summary: Represents the lifecycle status of an order.

member.name: F:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OrderStatus.Pending
member.summary: Order is created but not yet confirmed.

member.name: F:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OrderStatus.Confirmed
member.summary: Order has been confirmed.

member.name: F:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OrderStatus.Shipped
member.summary: Order has been shipped.

member.name: F:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OrderStatus.Delivered
member.summary: Order has been delivered to the customer.

member.name: F:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OrderStatus.Cancelled
member.summary: Order has been cancelled.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OutboxMessage
member.summary: Represents an outbox message used in the Outbox Pattern for reliable distributed messaging.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OutboxMessage.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier for the outbox message.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OutboxMessage.Type
member.summary: Gets the message type (fully qualified or short name).

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OutboxMessage.Payload
member.summary: Gets the serialized payload of the domain event.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OutboxMessage.CreatedAtUtc
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp when the message was created.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OutboxMessage.ProcessedAtUtc
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp when the message was processed (null if pending).

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OutboxMessage.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets the error message if processing failed.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OutboxMessage.RetryCount
member.summary: Gets the number of times processing was attempted.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OutboxMessage.Create(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Factory method to create a new OutboxMessage.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OutboxMessage.MarkAsProcessed
member.summary: Marks the message as successfully processed.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OutboxMessage.MarkAsFailed(System.String)
member.summary: Marks the message as failed with the given error detail.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Product
member.summary: Represents a product in the catalog.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Product.Name
member.summary: Gets the product name.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Product.Description
member.summary: Gets the product description.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Product.Price
member.summary: Gets the product price.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Product.StockQuantity
member.summary: Gets the available stock quantity.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Product.IsActive
member.summary: Gets whether the product is active.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Product.Create(System.String,System.String,System.Decimal,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new Product instance using factory method.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Product.Update(System.String,System.String,System.Decimal)
member.summary: Updates product details.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Product.DeductStock(System.Int32)
member.summary: Decrements stock by the given quantity.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Product.Deactivate
member.summary: Deactivates the product.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken
member.summary: Represents a JWT refresh token for a user.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.UserId
member.summary: Gets the user identifier this token belongs to.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.TokenHash
member.summary: Gets the hashed token value.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.ExpiresAtUtc
member.summary: Gets the UTC expiry date.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.IsRevoked
member.summary: Gets whether the token has been revoked.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.CreatedAtUtc
member.summary: Gets the UTC time when the token was created.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.Create(System.Guid,System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Factory method to create a new RefreshToken.

member.name: P:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.IsActive
member.summary: Returns true if the token is still valid.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken.Revoke
member.summary: Revokes this refresh token to prevent reuse.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Exceptions.NotFoundException
member.summary: Thrown when a requested domain resource is not found.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Exceptions.NotFoundException.#ctor(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Initializes a NotFoundException for the specified entity and key.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Exceptions.ConcurrencyException
member.summary: Thrown when a concurrency conflict is detected during a write operation.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Exceptions.ConcurrencyException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a ConcurrencyException with a message.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Exceptions.DomainException
member.summary: Thrown when a business rule or domain invariant is violated.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Exceptions.DomainException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a DomainException with a descriptive message.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Exceptions.UnauthorizedException
member.summary: Thrown when the caller is not authorized to perform an operation.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Exceptions.UnauthorizedException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes an UnauthorizedException with a message.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Repositories.IProductRepository
member.summary: Write-only repository interface for Product entities (EF Core).

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Repositories.IProductRepository.AddAsync(EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Product,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a new product to the store.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Repositories.IProductRepository.Update(EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Product)
member.summary: Updates an existing product in the store.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Repositories.IProductRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a product by its identifier using EF Core tracking.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Repositories.IProductRepository.SaveChangesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves all pending changes to the database.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Repositories.IOrderRepository
member.summary: Write-only repository interface for Order entities (EF Core).

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Repositories.IOrderRepository.AddAsync(EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.Order,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a new order.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Repositories.IOrderRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves an order with its items by identifier.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Repositories.IOrderRepository.SaveChangesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves all pending changes to the database.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Repositories.IRefreshTokenRepository
member.summary: Write-only repository interface for RefreshToken entities (EF Core).

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Repositories.IRefreshTokenRepository.AddAsync(EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a new refresh token.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Repositories.IRefreshTokenRepository.GetByHashAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves an active refresh token by its hash.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Domain.Repositories.IRefreshTokenRepository.SaveChangesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves all pending changes to the database.
